title: Blink Charging Q3 2025 Financial Results
text: Blink Charging reported adjusted EBITDA loss for Q3 2025 of $(8.9) million compared to $(14.0) million in the same period of 2024, showing significant quarterly improvement. Service revenue rose 44.7% to $49.3 million for full year 2025, nearly 50% of total revenue, demonstrating successful shift toward recurring revenue model. The company cut operating expenses by 26% year-over-year and reduced cash burn by 87% sequentially to $2.2 million, the lowest level in over three years. The transition to contract manufacturing is a strategic move to simplify operations and reduce costs, allowing focus on managing finished goods inventory while maintaining intellectual property ownership. Management expects continued operational improvements to position the Company for profitability in 2026.
